body: Discount must use BigDecimal arithmetic to avoid float precision drift in the cart subtotal.
Renamed UserService.findById to UserService.requireById to enforce non-null contract; rationale: 14 callers were silently passing through undefined.
npm test failed: HTTP 504 in payment.test.ts after 30s. Increasing JEST_TIMEOUT to 60s resolved; root cause: stripe sandbox cold-start latency.

fix(auth): reject empty Bearer token at middleware

Middleware previously treated empty token as anonymous; this allowed bypass on routes that gated by `req.user` being truthy. Adds explicit length check.
Database tables in production are immutable: schema migrations may add columns but never DROP COLUMN; downstream consumers depend on column stability.
Added retry-with-jitter to outbound webhook calls; existing constant-backoff thundering-herded the destination on cold-start.
